projectDescription: A Claude Code plugin that runs a Letta background agent to watch your sessions, build persistent memory, and whisper guidance back before each prompt.
keyFeatures: Persistent memory across Claude Code sessions via Letta agents
Four Claude Code lifecycle hooks: SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, Stop
Async background processing — never blocks Claude Code
Client-side SDK tools: Read, Grep, Glob, web search for the agent
Two injection modes: whisper (messages only) and full (memory blocks + messages)
Zero-config auto-import of bundled Subconscious agent
Automatic model detection and fallback selection
Multi-project support with shared agent brain
publicApiSurface: LETTA_API_KEY — Required API key for Letta authentication
LETTA_MODE — Controls injection mode: whisper | full | off
LETTA_AGENT_ID — Override the agent to use
LETTA_MODEL — Model override for the agent
LETTA_HOME — Base directory for plugin state files
LETTA_SDK_TOOLS — Client-side tool access: read-only | full | off
hooks/hooks.json — Hook definitions for Claude Code
scripts/agent_config.ts — Agent resolution and model configuration
scripts/conversation_utils.ts — Shared conversation and state utilities
